languages.text: "Ювенна — образцовая аристократка. Коварная, амбициозная интриганка. Именно поэтому я избрал ее в качестве наследницы моего Патента. Пока не появилась Лария". {n}Себериан издает тихий звук, похожий на вздох, и устало потирает бровь — удивительно человеческий жест.{/n}

"Juvenna was an exemplary noble. Wily, ambitious, scheming. That is why I chose her as the heir to my Warrant. Until Laria appeared." {n}Seberian emits a soft sound like a sigh and wearily rubs his brow, a surprisingly human gesture.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Ювенна — образцовая аристократка. Коварная, амбициозная интриганка. Именно поэтому я избрал ее в качестве наследницы моего Патента. Пока не появилась Лария". {n}Себериан издает тихий звук, похожий на вздох, и устало потирает бровь — удивительно человеческий жест.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Juvenna is an exemplary noble. Wily, ambitious, a schemer. That is why I chose her as the heir to my Warrant. Until Laria appeared." {n}Seberian emits a soft sound like a sigh and wearily rubs his brow, a surprisingly human gesture.{/n}

"Juvenna is an exemplary noble. Wily, ambitious, a schemer. That is why I chose her as the heir to my Warrant. Until Laria appeared." {n}Seberian emits a soft sound like a sigh and wearily rubs his brow, a surprisingly human gesture.{/n}

"Juvenna is an exemplary noble. Wily, ambitious, scheming. That is why I chose her as the heir to my Warrant. Until Laria appeared." {n}Seberian emits a soft sound like a sigh and wearily rubs his brow, a surprisingly human gesture.{/n}

"Juvenna is an exemplary noble. Wily, ambitious, scheming. That is why I chose her as the heir to my Warrant. Until Laria appeared." {n}Seberian emits a soft sound like a sigh and wearily rubs his brow, a surprisingly human gesture.{/n}

languages.text: "Juvenna war eine beispielhafte Adelige. Listig, ehrgeizig, intrigant. Deshalb habe ich sie als Erbin meines Handelsbriefs ausgewählt. Bis Laria kam." {n}Seberian stößt ein sanftes Seufzen aus und reibt sich mit einer überraschend menschlichen Geste müde die Augenbrauen.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Juvenna was an exemplary noble. Wily, ambitious, scheming. That is why I chose her as the heir to my Warrant. Until Laria appeared." {n}Seberian emits a soft sound like a sigh and wearily rubs his brow, a surprisingly human gesture.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Juvenna war eine beispielhafte Adelige. Listig, ehrgeizig, intrigant. Deshalb habe ich sie als Erbin meines Handelsbriefs ausgewählt. Bis Laria kam." {n}Seberian stößt ein sanftes Seufzen aus und reibt sich mit einer überraschend menschlichen Geste müde die Augenbrauen.{/n}

languages.text: « Juvenna était une noble typique. Rusée, ambitieuse, sournoise. C'est pour ça que je l'avais choisie comme héritière pour ma lettre de marque. Jusqu'à ce que Laria n'entre dans ma vie. » {n}Seberian émet un son discret proche d'un soupir et se frotte le front d'un geste fatigué, se donnant une apparence étonnamment humaine.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Juvenna was an exemplary noble. Wily, ambitious, scheming. That is why I chose her as the heir to my Warrant. Until Laria appeared." {n}Seberian emits a soft sound like a sigh and wearily rubs his brow, a surprisingly human gesture.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Juvenna était une noble typique. Rusée, ambitieuse, sournoise. C'est pour ça que je l'avais choisie comme héritière pour ma lettre de marque. Jusqu'à ce que Laria n'entre dans ma vie. » {n}Seberian émet un son discret proche d'un soupir et se frotte le front d'un geste fatigué, se donnant une apparence étonnamment humaine.{/n}

languages.text: «Juvenna era una noble ejemplar. Astuta, ambiciosa y taimada. Por eso la elegí como heredera de la Patente, hasta que apareció Laria». {n}Seberian suspira y se frota la frente con gesto sorprendentemente humano.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Juvenna was an exemplary noble. Wily, ambitious, scheming. That is why I chose her as the heir to my Warrant. Until Laria appeared." {n}Seberian emits a soft sound like a sigh and wearily rubs his brow, a surprisingly human gesture.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Juvenna era una noble ejemplar. Astuta, ambiciosa y taimada. Por eso la elegí como heredera de la Patente, hasta que apareció Laria». {n}Seberian suspira y se frota la frente con gesto sorprendentemente humano.{/n}

languages.text: "Juvenna, örnek bir soyluydu. Kurnaz, hırslı, entrikacı. Bu yüzden Ruhsatname vârisi olarak onu seçtim. Sonra Laria ortaya çıktı." {n}Seberian, iç çekişe benzer bir ses çıkarıyor ve şaşırtıcı derecede insani bir hareketle alnını ovuşturuyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Juvenna was an exemplary noble. Wily, ambitious, scheming. That is why I chose her as the heir to my Warrant. Until Laria appeared." {n}Seberian emits a soft sound like a sigh and wearily rubs his brow, a surprisingly human gesture.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Juvenna, örnek bir soyluydu. Kurnaz, hırslı, entrikacı. Bu yüzden Ruhsatname vârisi olarak onu seçtim. Sonra Laria ortaya çıktı." {n}Seberian, iç çekişe benzer bir ses çıkarıyor ve şaşırtıcı derecede insani bir hareketle alnını ovuşturuyor.{/n}

languages.text: “尤文娜是个典型的贵族。诡计多端、野心勃勃、精于算计。所以我才选她做我贸易授状的继承人。直到菈丽雅出现。”{n}塞贝里安发出一声类似叹息的轻响，疲惫地揉了揉额头，格外地像一个人类。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Juvenna was an exemplary noble. Wily, ambitious, scheming. That is why I chose her as the heir to my Warrant. Until Laria appeared." {n}Seberian emits a soft sound like a sigh and wearily rubs his brow, a surprisingly human gesture.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “尤文娜是个典型的贵族。诡计多端、野心勃勃、精于算计。所以我才选她做我贸易授状的继承人。直到菈丽雅出现。”{n}塞贝里安发出一声类似叹息的轻响，疲惫地揉了揉额头，格外地像一个人类。{/n}

languages.text: 「ジュベナは模範的な貴族だった。狡猾で野心家で、陰謀家だった。だから私は彼女を私の証書の後継者にした。ラリアが現れるまで。」{n}シベリアはため息のような音を立て、眉を疲弊そうに擦る。驚くほど人間らしい動作だ。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Juvenna was an exemplary noble. Wily, ambitious, scheming. That is why I chose her as the heir to my Warrant. Until Laria appeared." {n}Seberian emits a soft sound like a sigh and wearily rubs his brow, a surprisingly human gesture.{/n}
